hero.title: ToolCraft — Free Online Tools
hero.subtitle: Convert images, edit PDFs, write Markdown, format code — all in your browser. No uploads, no sign-ups, 100% free.

image.desc: Convert, compress, and optimize images — all in your browser, no uploads needed.

pdf.desc: Convert images to PDF, extract pages, merge documents — entirely browser-based.

markdown.desc: Write, preview, and convert Markdown. Perfect for AI chat outputs, docs, and README files.

dev.desc: Format JSON, encode Base64, generate UUIDs — fast, free, and private.

calculator.desc: Free online calculators for finance, health, and everyday use.

privacyFirst.title: Privacy First
privacyFirst.description: All tools run in your browser. Files never leave your device.

lightningFast.title: Lightning Fast
lightningFast.description: No server round-trips. Processing happens instantly.

alwaysFree.title: Always Free
alwaysFree.description: No limits, no premium tiers. All tools free forever.
